description_long: This object is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a detachable magazine. The frame features a light gray grip panel with visible fasteners, providing a visual contrast to the otherwise dark body. The slide is ribbed for improved handling and has a squared-off profile, while the barrel is short and robust, suitable for close-quarters use. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, offering ample space for finger placement. The magazine, shown removed, has a dark body with a blue accent and a visible copper-colored cartridge at the top. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with minimal decorative markings.
description: A compact, modern black handgun with a gray grip and a detachable magazine featuring blue and copper accents. The design is utilitarian with ribbed slide details and minimal markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle opening, barrel, and the top of the magazine with a visible cartridge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the gray grip panel, ribbed slide, and the magazine removed from the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the slide, rear sight, and the magazine's top with a visible cartridge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grip panel, slide serrations, and the magazine separated from the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a rectangular, light gray panel secured with two visible fasteners, providing a smooth and slightly contoured surface for ergonomic handling. The panel contrasts with the black frame and appears to be made of polymer or composite material. There are no visible finger grooves, checkering, or stippling, giving the grip a minimalist and modern appearance. The edges are slightly beveled for comfort, and no logos or embellishments are present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a thick profile that offers ample space for finger placement. It is smoothly contoured without any undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no visible texturing or reinforcement features. The design is simple and functional, prioritizing comfort and safety.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and has a standard, non-threaded profile with a wide muzzle opening. There are no visible compensators, ports, or suppressor threads. The exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide, and no markings or engravings are visible on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain, with ribbed serrations at the rear for improved grip during slide manipulation. No manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations are present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular with slightly beveled edges. It features a blue accent along the side and a visible copper-colored cartridge at the top. The design is simple, with no finger rests, logos, or additional texturing, emphasizing functionality over embellishment.
